name: Steamed Fish (Pachay)
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon achiote, dissolved in 1 teaspoon olive oil
1 pound whole fish - sea bass, scrod
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped garlic, onion, tomato, cilantro, salt, black pepper, and achiote sauce together.
2. Place half of the sauce in the center of a banana leaf or sheet of foil.
3. Lay the fish on top of the sauce.
4. Pour the remaining sauce over the fish.
5. Fold the leaf or foil around the fish, sealing it tightly.
6. Bake or roast the package on a comal or dry skillet for 20 minutes.
7. Turn the package over several times during roasting.
8. Unfold and serve warm.
Note: Achiote is used mainly to add red color to the dish. A comal is a flat clay plate about 24 inches in diameter.
